Ensures plan titles have enough meaningful 138â†’ content before they are used to generate filenames, branch names, or issue 139â†’ titles. On failure, returns ``InvalidPrTitle`` with actionable feedback 140â†’ (rules, actual value, examples) so the agent can self-correct and retry. 141â†’ 142â†’ Agent-facing callers: 143â†’ - ``plan_save`` (exec script) 144â†’ - ``issue_title_to_filename`` (exec script) 145â†’ 146â†’ Human-facing counterpart: 147â†’ ``generate_filename_from_title`` silently transforms arbitrary input 148â†’ (including emoji-only or accent-heavy strings) into a usable filename, 149â†’ bypassing this gate entirely. 150â†’ 151â†’ Args: 152â†’ title: The plan title string to validate. 153â†’ 154â†’ Returns:
... [25 lines omitted] ...

1â†’"""Plan save: creates a planned PR with the plan content. 2â†’ 3â†’Usage: 4â†’ erk exec plan-save [OPTIONS] 5â†’ 6â†’Options: 7â†’ --format json|display: Output format (default: json) 8â†’ --plan-file PATH: Use specific plan file (highest priority) 9â†’ --session-id ID: Session ID for scoped plan lookup 10â†’ --plan-type standard|learn: Plan type (default: standard) 11â†’ --learned-from-issue INT: Parent plan (for learn plans) 12â†’ --created-from-workflow-run-url URL: Workflow run URL 13â†’ 14â†’Objective linking: use --objective to pass directly, or rely on 15â†’automatic linking via the objective-context session marker 16â†’(created by /erk:objective-plan). The --objective flag takes 17â†’precedence over the session marker. 18â†’ 19â†’Exit Codes: 20â†’ 0: Success 21â†’ 1: Error 22â†’ 2: Validation failed 23â†’""" 24â†’ 25â†’import json 26â†’from pathlib import Path 27â†’ 28â†’import click 29â†’ 30â†’from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.validate_plan_content import _validate_plan_content
